parameters: \p4Is that Big Mouth and Smart Mouth?
\smartWha... what are you bastards doing here?
How did you even recognize us?
\p4I'm just as surprised to see you two... and you two still
look the same! Same hats, same hair... all you did was
put on some green. What's that about, anyways?
\smartWea' the leader of da' Dandy Toads now, suckas!
\smartWe arrived in Telluria to find the Dandy Toads looking like
a sorry bunch. They were founded by a defector from the
Banditos, but they were ineffective... until coming
under our incredible leadership! You'll never stop us!
\bigYea! You bunch a' losers kicked us right outta' Adon!
We ain't forgivin' ya' fo' dat!
\p4Then we'll just beat your asses one more time!
\smartPerhaps we should save that for another occasion.
Big Mouth and I have quite a few ludicrous business
plans underway. At last, finally back to crime!
\smartWe were just about to sneak through this camp...
I am not a religious man, but I pray to Trailia
that our parties never cross paths again.
And that's for your own sake!
\p4Y'know, seeing them again reminds me of Four-Toed Kevin.
Maybe we should pay him a visit?

\knightYou may not enter the Chief's Tent!
those blades are used for good.
\solYou're good to pass. Not much trouble around here, so
security's been light. Different story up north...
\solBe wary out there... the Blazing Sands are quite dangerous.
